description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a dark gable roof and a modern suburban design. The front features a prominent garage with a white door, a main entrance with a covered porch, and a large window above the entryway. On one side, there is a rectangular swimming pool with a metal ladder, and a small patio area shaded by a tree. The rear of the house includes a spacious glass-enclosed sunroom or veranda, and multiple large windows that provide ample natural light. The house is accented by black window awnings, a brick chimney, and a mix of traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A spacious two-story brick house with a gable roof, attached garage, swimming pool, and large windows, blending traditional and modern suburban features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large window, and swimming pool with patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage extension, tree-shaded patio, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glass-enclosed sunroom/veranda and multiple large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the brick chimney, rear windows, and pool visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, single front door, steps, and a large window above, accented by a black awning.
